calendar.matters:
HEARING ON FRANCISCO VELASCO KOSE'S PETITION FOR ORDER RECOGNIZING CHANGE OF GENDER AND SEX IDENTIFIER, FOR CHANGE OF NAME, AND FOR ISSUANCE OF NEW CERTIFICATES
Off Calendar Dec-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name and gender of Petitioner Francisco Velasco Kose.

Dept.505; Judge: Braden Woods; Clerk: N. Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:07 am and concluding at 9:11 am.

Petitioner Francisco Velasco Kose appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name and gender filed July 12, 2024.

Order to show cause filed July 12, 2024.

Notice of hearing filed November 26, 2024.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name and gender.

Order Recognizing change of gender and sex identifier and for name change and for issuance of new certificates signed and filed this day. (D505)
